home.title: Home
home.aboutDescription: I work on digital products, APIs and integrations with a focus on technical clarity, reliability and process impact. I am especially interested in software architecture, applied AI, observability and automation that reduces manual work.
home.aboutIntro: I like working where product, engineering and operations meet.
home.aboutDetail: My focus is turning ambiguous problems into systems that are easy to understand, simple to operate and ready to evolve. I connect interfaces, APIs, queues, integrations and metrics so the solution works well in practice, not only in the repository.

aboutCards.title: Product
aboutCards.description: I build with the real user flow in mind, the decisions the interface needs to support and the impact on daily operations.

aboutCards.title: Engineering
aboutCards.description: I organize code, integrations and architecture to reduce coupling, simplify maintenance and support evolution.

aboutCards.title: Operations
aboutCards.description: I pay attention to logs, metrics, automation and diagnosis so systems are observable from early versions.

home.experienceDescription: Recent work connecting product development, integrations, automation and production operations.

experienceItems.description: I worked on event-driven systems, webhooks, workers and telemetry, making queues, URLs, realms and production processing bottlenecks visible.
I worked on conversational bots and real-time WhatsApp integrations, focusing on concurrency, webhooks, cache and automation for customer service at scale.

experienceItems.role: Applied AI, automation and system design
experienceItems.description: I have been going deeper into flows with LLMs, RAG, n8n, Slack and API and queue design to reduce manual work and support new applications with operational clarity.

home.projectsDescription: Projects that connect product, engineering and operations: web platforms, integrations, automations, messaging and systems designed for scale.

projectCards.title: Intelligent Triage and Development Workflow Automation
projectCards.description: n8n • AI • Slack • Git Workflow Automation. Automation built to classify requests, integrate internal systems and reduce manual steps across operational and development workflows.
projectCards.alt: Workflow diagram with connected nodes representing automation, integrations and development pipeline
projectCards.problem: The team continuously received helper requests, fixes and refactors that had to be analyzed, routed and communicated manually before development work could begin.
projectCards.solution: I developed an n8n automation integrated with AI and Slack to classify requests, identify context, route each item to the responsible team and start steps related to fix or refactor tasks.
projectCards.impact: The project reinforced the importance of observable, resilient automations focused on real operational bottlenecks, while applying AI to automated decision-making and internal process orchestration.
projectCards.role: I developed the flow end to end, connecting AI classification, n8n orchestration, Slack notifications and development workflow steps.

projectCards.title: Think Cloud
projectCards.description: Platform for comparing cloud costs and supporting FinOps decisions. The solution organizes benchmarks and indicators into dashboards, bringing more clarity to technical and commercial analysis.
projectCards.problem: Cloud cost comparisons need to bring technical and commercial indicators together clearly to support FinOps decisions.
projectCards.solution: The platform structures benchmarks and dashboards so cost, capacity and opportunity analysis is easier to compare.
projectCards.impact: It supports technical and commercial conversations with better organized data, reducing dependence on scattered manual analysis.
projectCards.role: I contributed to the web experience and information structure for technical reading and decision-making.

projectCards.title: Webhooks and Notifications • Swap
projectCards.description: Messaging system for high-volume webhooks and notifications. The work made the real message flow visible by volume, URL and realm, exposing bottlenecks that were previously hidden inside the application.
projectCards.problem: The system processed a high volume of messages, but operations lacked clarity on which URLs, realms and queues concentrated load, or how Oban worker priority affected processing.
projectCards.solution: I instrumented telemetry to count messages by URL, realm and application flow, connecting operational metrics to worker behavior and making queue buildup visible.
projectCards.impact: The diagnosis moved beyond guesswork: it became possible to identify bottlenecks, adjust processing priorities and explain the incident in a technical article covering the investigation and fix.
projectCards.role: I instrumented telemetry, investigated Oban worker behavior and documented the diagnosis process in a technical article.

projectCards.title: Conversational Bots • Alertrack
projectCards.description: Conversational bot platform for customer service and real-time WhatsApp communication, connecting messages, business rules, webhooks and external automations.
projectCards.problem: Support more than 15,000 active users sending messages simultaneously, without turning conversation processing and integrations into an operational bottleneck.
projectCards.solution: I used Elixir for its lightweight process-based concurrency, modeling message intake through webhooks and cache heavy loads to keep the system responsive under load.
projectCards.impact: The architecture handled high real-time message volume, reduced manual customer service steps and made it possible to evolve automations without compromising operational stability.
projectCards.role: I worked on backend and integrations, modeling webhook intake, concurrent processing and support for external automations.

home.buildDescription: Principles I use to make technical decisions with a focus on product, maintenance and system evolution.

buildPrinciples.title: Understand the problem before the solution
buildPrinciples.description: I start with context, business goals, users involved and current limitations. Before thinking about technology, I need to understand which problem actually needs to be solved.

buildPrinciples.title: Map functional and non-functional requirements
buildPrinciples.description: I organize functional and non-functional requirements to separate what the system must do from criteria such as performance, security, scale, observability and maintainability.

buildPrinciples.title: Decide whether to evolve or create
buildPrinciples.description: I evaluate whether the best answer is changing existing code, refactoring part of the system, integrating with something already available or creating a new module. Building from scratch is the last option, not the first impulse.

buildPrinciples.title: Build, validate and evolve
buildPrinciples.description: After the technical decision, I implement in steps, validate behavior, observe the system in use and adjust based on evidence. The project ends with a solution that is operable, documented and ready to evolve.

home.stackDescription: Technologies I use to build products, integrations, automations and observable systems.
home.exploringDescription: I have been going deeper into AI and system design in the new applications emerging at my current company, connecting automation, architecture and operations from the first decisions.

exploringCards.title: Applied AI
exploringCards.description: I use LLMs and automations to classify requests, reduce manual steps and create flows that support real product decisions.

exploringCards.title: System Design
exploringCards.description: I design APIs, queues, observability and integrations with the evolution, diagnosis and operation of new applications in mind.

home.contactDescription: If you need to build a product, automate processes or evolve an architecture with more clarity and observability, I can help turn the idea into a practical solution.
home.contactMeta: Brazil / remote. Open to Full Stack, Backend, automation, applied AI and technical consulting opportunities.
